Log Threshold selection plot

Source: R/Plotting_and_Diagnostics.R
choose_logthresh_plot.Rd

Plots the results of choose_logthresh function

Usage

choose_logthresh_plot(choose_logthresh_df, cap = 10, perc_flat = 0.02)

Arguments

choose_logthresh_df

data.frame containing the output of choose_logthresh function

cap

parameter used for clarity of visualisation. Ratio of LogLik for 1st and 2nd peaks

perc_flat

option to target a particular proportion of samples with flat likelihoods (ie their peak is below the currently selected LogThresh)

Value

returns ggplot object

Author

Vadim Vasilyev

On this page
